buckets.title: Development Notes
buckets.description: Headings: CodeWiki, Features, Installation, From source (recommended during development), Verify installation, Quick Start, 1. Go to your project, 2. Initialize CodeWiki | Summary: Auto-generate deep engineering documentation from real codebases using AI. CodeWiki scans your repo, builds a bucket-based documentation plan, generates rich MDX pages with Mermaid diagrams, and builds a local-first Fumadocs site with Orama search. ---

page_contract.intent: Headings: CodeWiki, Features, Installation, From source (recommended during development), Verify installation, Quick Start, 1. Go to your project, 2. Initialize CodeWiki | Summary: Auto-generate deep engineering documentation from real codebases using AI. CodeWiki scans your repo, builds a bucket-based documentation plan, generates rich MDX pages with Mermaid diagrams, and builds a local-first Fumadocs site with Orama search. ---

repo_profile.evidence: Multiple backend frameworks (Django, Express, Fastify, etc.), many route detectors, API endpoints, CLI entrypoint, and test fixtures for both backend and frontend (Vue).
